title: Figure 8 in Evaluation of the Chilli veinal mottle virus CP gene expressing transgenic Nicotiana benthamiana plants for disease resistance against the virus
author: Riaz, T.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 8. PCR products from transgenic plants. (a) Lane 1-3, represent PCR product from agro-infilterated plants. Lane 4, control plant. (b) Lane 1-9, RT- PCR product from transgenic plants represent the presence of CP gene transcription. Lane 10, represents untransformed control sample.
steps_raw: Figure 8. PCR products from transgenic plants. (a) Lane 1-3, represent PCR product from agro-infilterated plants. Lane 4, control plant. (b) Lane 1-9, RT- PCR product from transgenic plants represent the presence of CP gene transcription. Lane 10, represents untransformed control sample.
